{{神社| 名称=亀山八幡宮| 所在地=長崎県佐世保市八幡町3-3| 祭神=応神天皇
仲哀天皇
神功皇后
仁徳天皇
保食神| 社格=県社・別表神社| 例祭=[[11月1～3日]] 佐世保くんち}} '''亀山八幡宮'''（かめやまはちまんぐう）は、[[長崎県]][[佐世保市]]にある[[神社]]である。 ==歴史== 神社に伝わる由緒によれば、[[天武天皇]]白鳳4年に神託により宇佐神宮から分霊を迎えたのが始まりという。その後[[江戸時代]]にかけて領主[[松浦氏]]の崇敬を受け[[東彼杵郡]]48ヶ浦の総鎮守として重んじられた。 [[明治時代]]以降は軍港佐世保の鎮守神として[[海軍]]将兵の信仰も集めたが、[[1945年]]6月の佐世保空襲で社殿を焼失した。現在の社殿は戦後再建されたもので鉄筋コンクリート製。 第2次世界大戦前は[[県社]]に列格し、戦後は[[神社本庁]]の[[別表神社]]となった。 ==祭神== *[[応神天皇]] *[[仲哀天皇]] *[[神功皇后]] *[[仁徳天皇]] *[[保食神]] この他、境内に亀山稲荷神社他合わせて7社の境内社がある。 ==交通== *[[佐世保市交通局|市営バス]]・[[西肥自動車|西肥バス]] 佐世保市役所前下車 ==外部リンク== ==関連項目== *[[神社一覧]] [[Category:長崎県の神社|かめやまはちまんくう]] [[Category:別表神社|かめやまはちまんくう]] [[Category:八幡宮|かめやまはちまんくう]] [[Category:佐世保市|ちんせいたいしやすわしんしや]]

保食神| 社格=県社・別表神社| 例祭=[[10月15日]]}} '''亀山八幡宮'''（かめやまはちまんぐう）は、[[長崎県]][[佐世保市]]にある[[神社]]である。 ==歴史== 神社に伝わる由緒によれば、[[天武天皇]]白鳳4年に神託により[[宇佐神宮]]から分霊を迎えたのが始まりという。その後[[江戸時代]]にかけて領主[[松浦氏]]の崇敬を受け[[東彼杵郡]]48ヶ浦の総鎮守として重んじられた。 [[明治時代]]以降は軍港佐世保の鎮守神として[[大日本帝国海軍|海軍]]将兵の信仰も集めたが、[[1945年]]6月の佐世保空襲で社殿を焼失した。現在の社殿は戦後の[[1964年]]に再建されたもので鉄筋コンクリート製。 第2次世界大戦前は[[県社]]に列格し、戦後は[[神社本庁]]の[[別表神社]]となった。 ==祭神== *[[応神天皇]] *[[仲哀天皇]] *[[神功皇后]] *[[仁徳天皇]] *[[保食神]] この他、境内に亀山稲荷神社他合わせて7社の境内社がある。 ==交通== *[[西肥自動車|西肥バス]]・[[佐世保市交通局|佐世保市営バス]]「佐世保市役所前」下車 ==関連項目== *[[佐世保くんち]] - 当神社の大祭である神幸祭を中心とした祭礼。毎年[[11月1日]]～[[11月3日]]。 *[[神社一覧]] *[[八幡神]] [[Category:長崎県の神社|かめやまはちまんくう]] [[Category:別表神社|かめやまはちまんくう]] [[Category:府県社|かめやまはちまんくう]] [[Category:八幡宮|かめやまはちまんくう]] [[Category:佐世保市|かめやまはちまんくう]]

保食神| 社格=県社・別表神社| 例祭=[[10月15日]]}} '''亀山八幡宮'''（かめやまはちまんぐう）は、[[長崎県]][[佐世保市]]にある[[神社]]である。 ==概要== 佐世保市の中心部、[[佐世保市役所]]の[[国道204号]]を挟んだ北東側に鎮座。市内で唯一の別表神社。 境内には亀山稲荷神社他合わせて7社の境内社がある。 ==歴史== 神社に伝わる由緒によれば、[[天武天皇]]白鳳4年に神託により[[宇佐神宮]]から分霊を迎えたのが始まりという。 [[明治時代]]以降に軍港佐世保の鎮守神として[[大日本帝国海軍|海軍]]将兵の信仰を集めたが、[[1945年]]6月29日未明の[[佐世保大空襲|佐世保空襲]]で社殿を焼失した。現在の社殿は戦後の[[1964年]]に再建されたもので鉄筋コンクリート製。 第2次世界大戦前は最終的に[[県社]]に列格し、戦後は[[神社本庁]]の[[別表神社]]となった。 ==祭神== *[[応神天皇]] *[[仲哀天皇]] *[[神功皇后]] *[[仁徳天皇]] *[[保食神]] ==行事== [[ファイル:Kameyama hachimangu shrine Summer festival.JPG|サムネイル|右|亀山八幡宮 夏祭りの様子]] *初詣、成人式、お宮参り、[[七五三参り]]、[[佐世保くんち]] *夏祭り - 8月1日～3日の3日間。2010年頃まで初日と最終日の午後9時より、隣接する[[長崎県立佐世保北中学校・高等学校|佐世保北高等学校]]のグラウンドより花火が打ち上げられていた。 ==交通== *[[西肥自動車|西肥バス]]・[[佐世保市交通局|佐世保市営バス]]「佐世保市役所前」下車 *[[松浦鉄道]][[松浦鉄道西九州線|西九州線]][[北佐世保駅]]下車 徒歩8分 ==関連項目== *[[佐世保くんち]] - 当神社の大祭である神幸祭を中心とした祭礼。毎年[[11月1日]]～[[11月3日]]。 *[[神社一覧]] *[[八幡神]] {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かめやまはちまんくう}} [[Category:長崎県の神社]] [[Category:別表神社]] [[Category:長崎県の旧県社]] [[Category:八幡宮]] [[Category:佐世保市の建築物]] [[Category:佐世保市の歴史]]

保食神 | 社格=県社・別表神社 | 例祭=[[10月15日]] }} '''亀山八幡宮'''（かめやまはちまんぐう）は、[[長崎県]][[佐世保市]]にある[[神社]]である。「八幡神社」や「八幡様」の通称で知られる、市内でも最大規模の境内を持つ神社。 ==概要== 佐世保市の中心部、[[佐世保市役所]]と[[国道204号]]を挟んだ北東側に鎮座。市内で唯一の[[別表神社]]。 境内には亀山稲荷神社他合わせて7社の境内社がある。 ==歴史== 神社に伝わる由緒によれば、[[天武天皇]][[白鳳]]4年に[[神託]]により[[宇佐神宮]]から[[分霊]]を迎えたのが始まりという。 [[明治時代]]以降に[[佐世保港|軍港佐世保]]の鎮守神として[[大日本帝国海軍|海軍]]将兵の信仰を集めたが、[[1945年]]6月29日未明の[[佐世保大空襲|佐世保空襲]]で社殿を焼失した。現在の社殿は戦後の[[1964年]]に再建されたもので鉄筋コンクリート製。 第2次世界大戦前は最終的に[[県社]]に列格し、戦後は[[神社本庁]]の別表神社となった。 ==祭神== *[[応神天皇]] *[[仲哀天皇]] *[[神功皇后]] *[[仁徳天皇]] *[[保食神]] ==行事== [[ファイル:Kameyama hachimangu shrine Summer festival.JPG|サムネイル|右|亀山八幡宮 夏祭りの様子]] *初詣、成人式、お宮参り、[[七五三参り]]、[[佐世保くんち]] *夏祭り - 8月1日～3日の3日間。参道に屋台・的屋などの[[出店]]があり、境内の舞台では舞踊が披露される。また、2010年頃まで初日と最終日の午後9時より、隣接する[[長崎県立佐世保北中学校・高等学校|佐世保北高等学校]]のグラウンドより[[花火]]が打ち上げられ、境内ではナイアガラ花火の点火を行なっていた。 ==交通== *[[西肥自動車|西肥バス]]（[[させぼバス]]も含む）「佐世保市役所前」下車 *[[松浦鉄道]][[松浦鉄道西九州線|西九州線]][[北佐世保駅]]下車 徒歩8分 ==関連項目== *[[佐世保くんち]] - 当神社の大祭である神幸祭を中心とした祭礼。毎年[[11月1日]]～[[11月3日]]。 *[[神社一覧]] *[[八幡神]] {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かめやまはちまんくう}} [[Category:長崎県の神社]] [[Category:別表神社]] [[Category:長崎県の旧県社]] [[Category:八幡宮]] [[Category:佐世保市の建築物]] [[Category:佐世保市の歴史]]

revision.text:
{{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name=Kameyama Hachimangu | image=[[image:Kameyama hachimangu Sasebo.jpg|250px]]
Shrine building | location=Nagasaki Prefecture, Sasebo City, Hachiman Town 3-3 | coordinates={{Coord|33|10|54.78|N|129|43|1.98|E|region:JP-42_scale:5000|display=inline,title}} | deity={{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}
{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|仲哀天皇}}
{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|神功皇后}}
{{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}}
{{ill|Ukemochi|ja|保食神}} | Shrine_rank=Prefectural shrine・{{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社}} | annual_festival={{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} | map = {{location map|Japan Nagasaki Prefecture|label=Kameyama Hachimangu|float=center|relief=1|width=256}} }} '''Kameyama Hachimangu''' (かめやまはちまんぐう) is a [[Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県}}, {{ill|Sasebo City|ja|佐世保市}}. Known locally as "Hachiman Shrine" or "Hachiman-sama," it is the largest shrine in the city. == Overview == The shrine is located in the center of Sasebo City, northeast of the {{ill|Sasebo City Hall|ja|佐世保市役所}} and across from National Route 204. It is the only {{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社}} in the city. Within the grounds, there are a total of seven auxiliary shrines, including the Kameyama Inari Shrine. == History == According to the shrine's tradition, it began in the 4th year of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇}} ({{ill|Hakuhō period|ja|白鳳}}) when a {{ill|divine message|ja|神託}} led to the transfer of spirits from [[Usa Jingū]] From the {{ill|Meiji period|ja|明治時代}} onwards, it became a guardian shrine for the naval personnel of the {{ill|Sasebo Naval District|ja|軍港佐世保}}, but the shrine buildings were destroyed during the {{ill|Sasebo Air Raid|ja|佐世保空襲}} on June 29, 1945. The current buildings were rebuilt in 1964 using reinforced concrete. Before World War II, it was finally ranked as a {{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社}}, and after the war, it became a Beppyo shrine of the {{ill|Association of Shinto Shrines|ja|神社本庁}}. == Deities == *{{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}} *{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|仲哀天皇}} *{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|神功皇后}} *{{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}} *{{ill|Ukemochi|ja|保食神}} == Events == [[File:Kameyama hachimangu shrine Summer festival.JPG|thumbnail|right|Kameyama Hachimangu Summer festival]] *Hatsumode, Coming-of-Age ceremony, Omiyamairi, {{ill|Shichi-Go-San|ja|七五三参り}}, {{ill|Sasebo Kunchi|ja|佐世保くんち}} *Summer festival - Held from August 1 to 3. Stalls and vendors are set up along the approach, and dances are performed on the stage within the shrine grounds. Until around 2010, fireworks were launched from the grounds of the adjacent {{ill|Sasebo Kita Junior High and High School|ja|長崎県立佐世保北中学校・高等学校}} at 9 PM on the first and last days, and Niagara fireworks were lit within the shrine grounds. == Access == *{{ill|Saihi Motor|ja|西肥自動車}} (including {{ill|Sasebo Bus|ja|させぼバス}}) Get off at "Sasebo City Hall" *{{ill|Matsuura Railway|ja|松浦鉄道}} {{ill|Nishi-Kyushu Line|ja|西九州線}} Get off at "Kita-Sasebo Station", 8 minutes on foot == See also == *{{ill|Sasebo Kunchi|ja|佐世保くんち}} - A festival centered around the shrine's grand festival held every year from November 1 to 3. *{{ill|List of shrines|ja|神社一覧}} *{{ill|Hachiman shrine|ja|八幡神}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kameyama Hachimangu}} [[Category:Shrines in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:beppyo shrines without templates]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[en:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Hachimangu]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Sasebo City]] [[Category:History of Sasebo City]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine-qq]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:bump]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:refreshing so the massreplace can be done again]] [[Category:kk]] [[Category:Subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:亀山八幡宮_(佐世保市)]] {{Beppyo Shrines}} [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[ja:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]]

Shrine building | location=Nagasaki Prefecture, Sasebo City, Hachiman Town 3-3 | coordinates={{Coord|33|10|54.78|N|129|43|1.98|E|region:JP-42_scale:5000|display=inline,title}} | deity={{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}
{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|仲哀天皇}}
{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|神功皇后}}
{{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}}
{{ill|Ukemochi|ja|保食神}} | Shrine_rank=Prefectural shrine・{{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社}} | annual_festival={{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} | map = {{location map|Japan Nagasaki Prefecture|label=Kameyama Hachimangu|float=center|relief=1|width=256}} }} '''Kameyama Hachimangu''' (かめやまはちまんぐう) is a [[Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県}}, {{ill|Sasebo City|ja|佐世保市}}. Known locally as "Hachiman Shrine" or "Hachiman-sama," it is the largest shrine in the city. == Overview == The shrine is located in the center of Sasebo City, northeast of the {{ill|Sasebo City Hall|ja|佐世保市役所}} and across from National Route 204. It is the only {{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社}} in the city. Within the grounds, there are a total of seven auxiliary shrines, including the Kameyama Inari Shrine. == History == According to the shrine's tradition, it began in the 4th year of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇}} ({{ill|Hakuhō period|ja|白鳳}}) when a {{ill|divine message|ja|神託}} led to the transfer of spirits from [[Usa Jingū]] From the {{ill|Meiji period|ja|明治時代}} onwards, it became a guardian shrine for the naval personnel of the {{ill|Sasebo Naval District|ja|軍港佐世保}}, but the shrine buildings were destroyed during the {{ill|Sasebo Air Raid|ja|佐世保空襲}} on June 29, 1945. The current buildings were rebuilt in 1964 using reinforced concrete. Before World War II, it was finally ranked as a {{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社}}, and after the war, it became a Beppyo shrine of the {{ill|Association of Shinto Shrines|ja|神社本庁}}. == Deities == *{{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}} *{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|仲哀天皇}} *{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|神功皇后}} *{{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}} *{{ill|Ukemochi|ja|保食神}} == Events == [[File:Kameyama hachimangu shrine Summer festival.JPG|thumbnail|right|Kameyama Hachimangu Summer festival]] *Hatsumode, Coming-of-Age ceremony, Omiyamairi, {{ill|Shichi-Go-San|ja|七五三参り}}, {{ill|Sasebo Kunchi|ja|佐世保くんち}} *Summer festival - Held from August 1 to 3. Stalls and vendors are set up along the approach, and dances are performed on the stage within the shrine grounds. Until around 2010, fireworks were launched from the grounds of the adjacent {{ill|Sasebo Kita Junior High and High School|ja|長崎県立佐世保北中学校・高等学校}} at 9 PM on the first and last days, and Niagara fireworks were lit within the shrine grounds. == Access == *{{ill|Saihi Motor|ja|西肥自動車}} (including {{ill|Sasebo Bus|ja|させぼバス}}) Get off at "Sasebo City Hall" *{{ill|Matsuura Railway|ja|松浦鉄道}} {{ill|Nishi-Kyushu Line|ja|西九州線}} Get off at "Kita-Sasebo Station", 8 minutes on foot == See also == *{{ill|Sasebo Kunchi|ja|佐世保くんち}} - A festival centered around the shrine's grand festival held every year from November 1 to 3. *{{ill|List of shrines|ja|神社一覧}} *{{ill|Hachiman shrine|ja|八幡神}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kameyama Hachimangu}} [[Category:Shrines in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:beppyo shrines without templates]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[en:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Hachimangu]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Sasebo City]] [[Category:History of Sasebo City]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine-qq]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:bump]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:refreshing so the massreplace can be done again]] [[Category:kk]] [[Category:SuQqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:亀山八幡宮_(佐世保市)]] {{Beppyo Shrines}} [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[ja:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]]

{{ill|Ukemochi|ja|保食神}} | Shrine_rank=Prefectural shrine・{{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社}} | annual_festival={{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} | map = {{location map|Japan Nagasaki Prefecture|label=Kameyama Hachimangu|float=center|relief=1|width=256}} }} '''Kameyama Hachimangu''' (かめやまはちまんぐう) is a [[Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県}}, {{ill|Sasebo City|ja|佐世保市}}. Known locally as "Hachiman Shrine" or "Hachiman-sama," it is the largest shrine in the city. == Overview == The shrine is located in the center of Sasebo City, northeast of the {{ill|Sasebo City Hall|ja|佐世保市役所}} and across from National Route 204. It is the only {{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社}} in the city. Within the grounds, there are a total of seven auxiliary shrines, including the Kameyama Inari Shrine. == History == According to the shrine's tradition, it began in the 4th year of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇}} ({{ill|Hakuhō period|ja|白鳳}}) when a {{ill|divine message|ja|神託}} led to the transfer of spirits from [[Usa Jingū]] From the {{ill|Meiji period|ja|明治時代}} onwards, it became a guardian shrine for the naval personnel of the {{ill|Sasebo Naval District|ja|軍港佐世保}}, but the shrine buildings were destroyed during the {{ill|Sasebo Air Raid|ja|佐世保空襲}} on June 29, 1945. The current buildings were rebuilt in 1964 using reinforced concrete. Before World War II, it was finally ranked as a {{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社}}, and after the war, it became a Beppyo shrine of the {{ill|Association of Shinto Shrines|ja|神社本庁}}. == Deities == *{{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}} *{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|仲哀天皇}} *{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|神功皇后}} *{{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}} *{{ill|Ukemochi|ja|保食神}} == Events == [[File:Kameyama hachimangu shrine Summer festival.JPG|thumbnail|right|Kameyama Hachimangu Summer festival]] *Hatsumode, Coming-of-Age ceremony, Omiyamairi, {{ill|Shichi-Go-San|ja|七五三参り}}, {{ill|Sasebo Kunchi|ja|佐世保くんち}} *Summer festival - Held from August 1 to 3. Stalls and vendors are set up along the approach, and dances are performed on the stage within the shrine grounds. Until around 2010, fireworks were launched from the grounds of the adjacent {{ill|Sasebo Kita Junior High and High School|ja|長崎県立佐世保北中学校・高等学校}} at 9 PM on the first and last days, and Niagara fireworks were lit within the shrine grounds. == Access == *{{ill|Saihi Motor|ja|西肥自動車}} (including {{ill|Sasebo Bus|ja|させぼバス}}) Get off at "Sasebo City Hall" *{{ill|Matsuura Railway|ja|松浦鉄道}} {{ill|Nishi-Kyushu Line|ja|西九州線}} Get off at "Kita-Sasebo Station", 8 minutes on foot == See also == *{{ill|Sasebo Kunchi|ja|佐世保くんち}} - A festival centered around the shrine's grand festival held every year from November 1 to 3. *{{ill|List of shrines|ja|神社一覧}} *{{ill|Hachiman shrine|ja|八幡神}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kameyama Hachimangu}} [[Category:Shrines in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:beppyo shrines without templates]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[en:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Hachimangu]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Sasebo City]] [[Category:History of Sasebo City]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine-qq]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:bump]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:refreshing so the massreplace can be done again]] [[Category:kk]] [[Category:SuQqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:亀山八幡宮_(佐世保市)]] {{Beppyo Shrines}} [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[ja:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Removing this excess]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]]

Until around 2010, fireworks were launched from the grounds of the adjacent {{ill|Sasebo Kita Junior High and High School|ja|長崎県立佐世保北中学校・高等学校}} at 9 PM on the first and last days, and Niagara fireworks were lit within the shrine grounds. == Access == *{{ill|Saihi Motor|ja|西肥自動車}} (including {{ill|Sasebo Bus|ja|させぼバス}}) Get off at "Sasebo City Hall" *{{ill|Matsuura Railway|ja|松浦鉄道}} {{ill|Nishi-Kyushu Line|ja|西九州線}} Get off at "Kita-Sasebo Station", 8 minutes on foot == See also == *{{ill|Sasebo Kunchi|ja|佐世保くんち}} - Shrine building | location=Nagasaki Prefecture, Sasebo City, Hachiman Town 3-3 | coordinates={{Coord|33|10|54.78|N|129|43|1.98|E|region:JP-42_scale:5000|display=inline,title}} | deity={{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}
{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|仲哀天皇}}
{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|神功皇后}}
{{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}}
{{ill|Ukemochi|ja|保食神}} | Shrine_rank=Prefectural shrine・{{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社}} | annual_festival={{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} | map = {{location map|Japan Nagasaki Prefecture|label=Kameyama Hachimangu|float=center|relief=1|width=256}} }} '''Kameyama Hachimangu''' (かめやまはちまんぐう) is a [[Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県}}, {{ill|Sasebo City|ja|佐世保市}}. Known locally as "Hachiman Shrine" or "Hachiman-sama," it is the largest shrine in the city. == Overview == The shrine is located in the center of Sasebo City, northeast of the {{ill|Sasebo City Hall|ja|佐世保市役所}} and across from National Route 204. It is the only {{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社}} in the city. Within the grounds, there are a total of seven auxiliary shrines, including the Kameyama Inari Shrine. == History == According to the shrine's tradition, it began in the 4th year of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇}} ({{ill|Hakuhō period|ja|白鳳}}) when a {{ill|divine message|ja|神託}} led to the transfer of spirits from [[Usa Jingū]] From the {{ill|Meiji period|ja|明治時代}} onwards, it became a guardian shrine for the naval personnel of the {{ill|Sasebo Naval District|ja|軍港佐世保}}, but the shrine buildings were destroyed during the {{ill|Sasebo Air Raid|ja|佐世保空襲}} on June 29, 1945. The current buildings were rebuilt in 1964 using reinforced concrete. Before World War II, it was finally ranked as a {{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社}}, and after the war, it became a Beppyo shrine of the {{ill|Association of Shinto Shrines|ja|神社本庁}}. == Deities == *{{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}} *{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|仲哀天皇}} *{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|神功皇后}} *{{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}} *{{ill|Ukemochi|ja|保食神}} == Events == [[File:Kameyama hachimangu shrine Summer festival.JPG|thumbnail|right|Kameyama Hachimangu Summer festival]] *Hatsumode, Coming-of-Age ceremony, Omiyamairi, {{ill|Shichi-Go-San|ja|七五三参り}}, {{ill|Sasebo Kunchi|ja|佐世保くんち}} *Summer festival - Held from August 1 to 3. Stalls and vendors are set up along the approach, and dances are performed on the stage within the shrine grounds. Until around 2010, fireworks were launched from the grounds of the adjacent {{ill|Sasebo Kita Junior High and High School|ja|長崎県立佐世保北中学校・高等学校}} at 9 PM on the first and last days, and Niagara fireworks were lit within the shrine grounds. == Access == *{{ill|Saihi Motor|ja|西肥自動車}} (including {{ill|Sasebo Bus|ja|させぼバス}}) Get off at "Sasebo City Hall" *{{ill|Matsuura Railway|ja|松浦鉄道}} {{ill|Nishi-Kyushu Line|ja|西九州線}} Get off at "Kita-Sasebo Station", 8 minutes on foot == See also == *{{ill|Sasebo Kunchi|ja|佐世保くんち}} - A festival centered around the shrine's grand festival held every year from November 1 to 3. *{{ill|List of shrines|ja|神社一覧}} *{{ill|Hachiman shrine|ja|八幡神}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kameyama Hachimangu}} [[Category:Shrines in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:beppyo shrines without templates]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[en:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Hachimangu]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Sasebo City]] [[Category:History of Sasebo City]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine-qq]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:bump]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:refreshing so the massreplace can be done again]] [[Category:kk]] [[Category:SuQqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:亀山八幡宮_(佐世保市)]] {{Beppyo Shrines}} [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[ja:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Removing this excess]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]][[Category:qq 1]]\[[Category:Completion tier 5]][[Category:qq 2]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category: :qq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]]

A festival centered around the shrine's grand festival held every year from November 1 to 3. *{{ill|List of shrines|ja|神社一覧}} *{{ill|Hachiman shrine|ja|八幡神}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kameyama Hachimangu}} [[Category:Shrines in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:beppyo shrines without templates]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[en:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Hachimangu]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Sasebo City]] [[Category:History of Sasebo City]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted Completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine-qq]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:bump]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:refreshing so the massreplace can be done again]] [[Category:kk]] [[Category:SuQqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:亀山八幡宮_(佐世保市)]] {{Beppyo Shrines}} [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[ja:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Removing this excess]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]][[Category:tier 5]][[Category: 5]][[Category:qq 1]]\[[Category:Completion tier 5]][[Category:tier 5]][[Category: 5]][[Category:qq 2]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]]

Shrine building | location=Nagasaki Prefecture, Sasebo City, Hachiman Town 3-3 | coordinates={{Coord|33|10|54.78|N|129|43|1.98|E|region:JP-42_scale:5000|display=inline,title}} | deity={{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}
{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|仲哀天皇}}
{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|神功皇后}}

{{ill|Ukemochi|ja|保食神}} | Shrine_rank=Prefectural shrine・{{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社}} | annual_festival={{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} | map = {{location map|Japan Nagasaki Prefecture|label=Kameyama Hachimangu|float=center|relief=1|width=256}} }} '''Kameyama Hachimangu''' (かめやまはちまんぐう) is a [[Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県}}, {{ill|Sasebo City|ja|佐世保市}}. Known locally as "Hachiman Shrine" or "Hachiman-sama," it is the largest shrine in the city. == Overview == The shrine is located in the center of Sasebo City, northeast of the {{ill|Sasebo City Hall|ja|佐世保市役所}} and across from National Route 204. It is the only {{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社}} in the city. Within the grounds, there are a total of seven auxiliary shrines, including the Kameyama Inari Shrine. == History == According to the shrine's tradition, it began in the 4th year of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇}} ({{ill|Hakuhō period|ja|白鳳}}) when a {{ill|divine message|ja|神託}} led to the transfer of spirits from [[Usa Jingū]] From the {{ill|Meiji period|ja|明治時代}} onwards, it became a guardian shrine for the naval personnel of the {{ill|Sasebo Naval District|ja|軍港佐世保}}, but the shrine buildings were destroyed during the {{ill|Sasebo Air Raid|ja|佐世保空襲}} on June 29, 1945. The current buildings were rebuilt in 1964 using reinforced concrete. Before World War II, it was finally ranked as a {{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社}}, and after the war, it became a Beppyo shrine of the {{ill|Association of Shinto Shrines|ja|神社本庁}}. == Deities == *{{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}} *{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|仲哀天皇}} *{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|神功皇后}} *{{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}} *{{ill|Ukemochi|ja|保食神}} == Events == [[File:Kameyama hachimangu shrine Summer festival.JPG|thumbnail|right|Kameyama Hachimangu Summer festival]] *Hatsumode, Coming-of-Age ceremony, Omiyamairi, {{ill|Shichi-Go-San|ja|七五三参り}}, {{ill|Sasebo Kunchi|ja|佐世保くんち}} *Summer festival - Held from August 1 to 3. Stalls and vendors are set up along the approach, and dances are performed on the stage within the shrine grounds. Until around 2010, fireworks were launched from the grounds of the adjacent {{ill|Sasebo Kita Junior High and High School|ja|長崎県立佐世保北中学校・高等学校}} at 9 PM on the first and last days, and Niagara fireworks were lit within the shrine grounds. == Access == *{{ill|Saihi Motor|ja|西肥自動車}} (including {{ill|Sasebo Bus|ja|させぼバス}}) Get off at "Sasebo City Hall" *{{ill|Matsuura Railway|ja|松浦鉄道}} {{ill|Nishi-Kyushu Line|ja|西九州線}} Get off at "Kita-Sasebo Station", 8 minutes on foot == See also == *{{ill|Sasebo Kunchi|ja|佐世保くんち}} - A festival centered around the shrine's grand festival held every year from November 1 to 3. *{{ill|List of shrines|ja|神社一覧}} *{{ill|Hachiman shrine|ja|八幡神}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kameyama Hachimangu}} [[Category:Shrines in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:beppyo shrines without templates]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[en:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Hachimangu]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Sasebo City]] [[Category:History of Sasebo City]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted Completion categories]] [[Category:qq deprecated open]][[Category:qq deprecated close]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:bump]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:refreshing so the massreplace can be done again]] [[Category:kk]] [[Category:SuQqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:亀山八幡宮_(佐世保市)]] {{Beppyo Shrines}} [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[sn:ameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Removing this excess]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]][[Category:tier 5]][[Category: 5]][[Category:qq 1]]\[[Category:Completion tier 5]][[Category:tier 5]][[Category: 5]][[Category:qq 2]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:ameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]]

{{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name=Kameyama Hachimangu | image=[[image:Kameyama hachimangu Sasebo.jpg|250px]]
Shrine building | location=Nagasaki Prefecture, Sasebo City, Hachiman Town 3-3 | coordinates={{Coord|33|10|54.78|N|129|43|1.98|E|region:JP-42_scale:5000|display=inline,title}} | deity={{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}
{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|仲哀天皇}}
{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|神功皇后}}
{{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}}
{{ill|Ukemochi|ja|保食神}} | Shrine_rank=Prefectural shrine・{{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社}} | annual_festival={{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} | map = {{location map|Japan Nagasaki Prefecture|label=Kameyama Hachimangu|float=center|relief=1|width=256}} }} '''Kameyama Hachimangu''' (かめやまはちまんぐう) is a [[Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県}}, {{ill|Sasebo City|ja|佐世保市}}. Known locally as "Hachiman Shrine" or "Hachiman-sama," it is the largest shrine in the city. == Overview == The shrine is located in the center of Sasebo City, northeast of the {{ill|Sasebo City Hall|ja|佐世保市役所}} and across from National Route 204. It is the only {{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社}} in the city. Within the grounds, there are a total of seven auxiliary shrines, including the Kameyama Inari Shrine. == History == According to the shrine's tradition, it began in the 4th year of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇}} ({{ill|Hakuhō period|ja|白鳳}}) when a {{ill|divine message|ja|神託}} led to the transfer of spirits from [[Usa Jingū]] From the {{ill|Meiji period|ja|明治時代}} onwards, it became a guardian shrine for the naval personnel of the {{ill|Sasebo Naval District|ja|軍港佐世保}}, but the shrine buildings were destroyed during the {{ill|Sasebo Air Raid|ja|佐世保空襲}} on June 29, 1945. The current buildings were rebuilt in 1964 using reinforced concrete. Before World War II, it was finally ranked as a {{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社}}, and after the war, it became a Beppyo shrine of the {{ill|Association of Shinto Shrines|ja|神社本庁}}. == Deities == *{{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}} *{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|仲哀天皇}} *{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|神功皇后}} *{{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}} *{{ill|Ukemochi|ja|保食神}} == Events == [[File:Kameyama hachimangu shrine Summer festival.JPG|thumbnail|right|Kameyama Hachimangu Summer festival]] *Hatsumode, Coming-of-Age ceremony, Omiyamairi, {{ill|Shichi-Go-San|ja|七五三参り}}, {{ill|Sasebo Kunchi|ja|佐世保くんち}} *Summer festival - Held from August 1 to 3. Stalls and vendors are set up along the approach, and dances are performed on the stage within the shrine grounds. Until around 2010, fireworks were launched from the grounds of the adjacent {{ill|Sasebo Kita Junior High and High School|ja|長崎県立佐世保北中学校・高等学校}} at 9 PM on the first and last days, and Niagara fireworks were lit within the shrine grounds. == Access == *{{ill|Saihi Motor|ja|西肥自動車}} (including {{ill|Sasebo Bus|ja|させぼバス}}) Get off at "Sasebo City Hall" *{{ill|Matsuura Railway|ja|松浦鉄道}} {{ill|Nishi-Kyushu Line|ja|西九州線}} Get off at "Kita-Sasebo Station", 8 minutes on foot == See also == *{{ill|Sasebo Kunchi|ja|佐世保くんち}} - A festival centered around the shrine's grand festival held every year from November 1 to 3. *{{ill|List of shrines|ja|神社一覧}} *{{ill|Hachiman shrine|ja|八幡神}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kameyama Hachimangu}} [[Category:Shrines in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:beppyo shrines without templates]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[en:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Hachimangu]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Sasebo City]] [[Category:History of Sasebo City]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted Completion categories]] [[Category:qq deprecated open]][[Category:qq deprecated close]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:bump]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:kk]] [[Category:SuQqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:亀山八幡宮_(佐世保市)]] {{Beppyo Shrines}} [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[sn:ameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Removing this excess]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]][[Category:tier 5]][[Category: 5]][[Category:qq 1]]\[[Category:Completion tier 5]][[Category:tier 5]][[Category: 5]][[Category:qq 2]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:ameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]]

A festival centered around the shrine's grand festival held every year from November 1 to 3. *{{ill|List of shrines|ja|神社一覧}} *{{ill|Hachiman shrine|ja|八幡神}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kameyama Hachimangu}} [[Category:Shrines in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:beppyo shrines without templates]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[en:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Hachimangu]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Sasebo City]] [[Category:History of Sasebo City]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted Completion categories]] [[Category:qq deprecated open]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:bump]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:kk]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:亀山八幡宮_(佐世保市)]] {{Beppyo Shrines}} [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[sn:ameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Removing this excess]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]][[Category:tier 5]][[Category: 5]][[Category:qq 1]]\[[Category:Completion tier 5]][[Category:tier 5]][[Category: 5]][[Category:qq 2]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:ameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]]

{{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name=Kameyama Hachimangu | image=[[image:Kameyama hachimangu Sasebo.jpg|250px]]
Shrine building | location=Nagasaki Prefecture, Sasebo City, Hachiman Town 3-3 | coordinates={{Coord|33|10|54.78|N|129|43|1.98|E|region:JP-42_scale:5000|display=inline,title}} | deity={{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}
{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|仲哀天皇}}
{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|神功皇后}}
{{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}}
{{ill|Ukemochi|ja|保食神}} | Shrine_rank=Prefectural shrine・{{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社}} | annual_festival={{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} | map = {{location map|Japan Nagasaki Prefecture|label=Kameyama Hachimangu|float=center|relief=1|width=256}} }} '''Kameyama Hachimangu''' (かめやまはちまんぐう) is a [[Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県}}, {{ill|Sasebo City|ja|佐世保市}}. Known locally as "Hachiman Shrine" or "Hachiman-sama," it is the largest shrine in the city. == Overview == The shrine is located in the center of Sasebo City, northeast of the {{ill|Sasebo City Hall|ja|佐世保市役所}} and across from National Route 204. It is the only {{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社}} in the city. Within the grounds, there are a total of seven auxiliary shrines, including the Kameyama Inari Shrine. == History == According to the shrine's tradition, it began in the 4th year of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇}} ({{ill|Hakuhō period|ja|白鳳}}) when a {{ill|divine message|ja|神託}} led to the transfer of spirits from [[Usa Jingū]] From the {{ill|Meiji period|ja|明治時代}} onwards, it became a guardian shrine for the naval personnel of the {{ill|Sasebo Naval District|ja|軍港佐世保}}, but the shrine buildings were destroyed during the {{ill|Sasebo Air Raid|ja|佐世保空襲}} on June 29, 1945. The current buildings were rebuilt in 1964 using reinforced concrete. Before World War II, it was finally ranked as a {{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社}}, and after the war, it became a Beppyo shrine of the {{ill|Association of Shinto Shrines|ja|神社本庁}}. == Deities == *{{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}} *{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|仲哀天皇}} *{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|神功皇后}} *{{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}} *{{ill|Ukemochi|ja|保食神}} == Events == [[File:Kameyama hachimangu shrine Summer festival.JPG|thumbnail|right|Kameyama Hachimangu Summer festival]] *Hatsumode, Coming-of-Age ceremony, Omiyamairi, {{ill|Shichi-Go-San|ja|七五三参り}}, {{ill|Sasebo Kunchi|ja|佐世保くんち}} *Summer festival - Held from August 1 to 3. Stalls and vendors are set up along the approach, and dances are performed on the stage within the shrine grounds. Until around 2010, fireworks were launched from the grounds of the adjacent {{ill|Sasebo Kita Junior High and High School|ja|長崎県立佐世保北中学校・高等学校}} at 9 PM on the first and last days, and Niagara fireworks were lit within the shrine grounds. == Access == *{{ill|Saihi Motor|ja|西肥自動車}} (including {{ill|Sasebo Bus|ja|させぼバス}}) Get off at "Sasebo City Hall" *{{ill|Matsuura Railway|ja|松浦鉄道}} {{ill|Nishi-Kyushu Line|ja|西九州線}} Get off at "Kita-Sasebo Station", 8 minutes on foot == See also == *{{ill|Sasebo Kunchi|ja|佐世保くんち}} - A festival centered around the shrine's grand festival held every year from November 1 to 3. *{{ill|List of shrines|ja|神社一覧}} *{{ill|Hachiman shrine|ja|八幡神}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kameyama Hachimangu}} [[Category:Shrines in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:beppyo shrines without templates]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[en:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Hachimangu]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Sasebo City]] [[Category:History of Sasebo City]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted Completion categories]] [[Category:qq deprecated open]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:bump]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:kk]] [[Category:SuQqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:亀山八幡宮_(佐世保市)]] {{Beppyo Shrines}} [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[sn:ameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]][[Category:tier 5]][[Category: 5]][[Category:qq 1]]\[[Category:Completion tier 5]][[Category:tier 5]][[Category: 5]][[Category:qq 2]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:ameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]]

A festival centered around the shrine's grand festival held every year from November 1 to 3. *{{ill|List of shrines|ja|神社一覧}} *{{ill|Hachiman shrine|ja|八幡神}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kameyama Hachimangu}} [[Category:Shrines in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:beppyo shrines without templates]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[en:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Hachimangu]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Sasebo City]] [[Category:History of Sasebo City]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted Completion categories]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:bump]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:kk]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:亀山八幡宮_(佐世保市)]] {{Beppyo Shrines}} [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[sn:ameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:tier 5]][[Category: 5]][[Category:qq 1]]\[[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:tier 5]][[Category: 5]][[Category:qq 2]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:ameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]]

{{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name=Kameyama Hachimangu | image=[[image:Kameyama hachimangu Sasebo.jpg|250px]]
Shrine building | location=Nagasaki Prefecture, Sasebo City, Hachiman Town 3-3 | coordinates={{Coord|33|10|54.78|N|129|43|1.98|E|region:JP-42_scale:5000|display=inline,title}} | deity={{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}
{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|仲哀天皇}}
{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|神功皇后}}
{{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}}
{{ill|Ukemochi|ja|保食神}} | Shrine_rank=Prefectural shrine・{{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社}} | annual_festival={{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} | map = {{location map|Japan Nagasaki Prefecture|label=Kameyama Hachimangu|float=center|relief=1|width=256}} }} '''Kameyama Hachimangu''' (かめやまはちまんぐう) is a [[Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県}}, {{ill|Sasebo City|ja|佐世保市}}. Known locally as "Hachiman Shrine" or "Hachiman-sama," it is the largest shrine in the city. == Overview == The shrine is located in the center of Sasebo City, northeast of the {{ill|Sasebo City Hall|ja|佐世保市役所}} and across from National Route 204. It is the only {{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社}} in the city. Within the grounds, there are a total of seven auxiliary shrines, including the Kameyama Inari Shrine. == History == According to the shrine's tradition, it began in the 4th year of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇}} ({{ill|Hakuhō period|ja|白鳳}}) when a {{ill|divine message|ja|神託}} led to the transfer of spirits from [[Usa Jingū]] From the {{ill|Meiji period|ja|明治時代}} onwards, it became a guardian shrine for the naval personnel of the {{ill|Sasebo Naval District|ja|軍港佐世保}}, but the shrine buildings were destroyed during the {{ill|Sasebo Air Raid|ja|佐世保空襲}} on June 29, 1945. The current buildings were rebuilt in 1964 using reinforced concrete. Before World War II, it was finally ranked as a {{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社}}, and after the war, it became a Beppyo shrine of the {{ill|Association of Shinto Shrines|ja|神社本庁}}. == Deities == *{{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}} *{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|仲哀天皇}} *{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|神功皇后}} *{{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}} *{{ill|Ukemochi|ja|保食神}} == Events == [[File:Kameyama hachimangu shrine Summer festival.JPG|thumbnail|right|Kameyama Hachimangu Summer festival]] *Hatsumode, Coming-of-Age ceremony, Omiyamairi, {{ill|Shichi-Go-San|ja|七五三参り}}, {{ill|Sasebo Kunchi|ja|佐世保くんち}} *Summer festival - Held from August 1 to 3. Stalls and vendors are set up along the approach, and dances are performed on the stage within the shrine grounds. Until around 2010, fireworks were launched from the grounds of the adjacent {{ill|Sasebo Kita Junior High and High School|ja|長崎県立佐世保北中学校・高等学校}} at 9 PM on the first and last days, and Niagara fireworks were lit within the shrine grounds. == Access == *{{ill|Saihi Motor|ja|西肥自動車}} (including {{ill|Sasebo Bus|ja|させぼバス}}) Get off at "Sasebo City Hall" *{{ill|Matsuura Railway|ja|松浦鉄道}} {{ill|Nishi-Kyushu Line|ja|西九州線}} Get off at "Kita-Sasebo Station", 8 minutes on foot == See also == *{{ill|Sasebo Kunchi|ja|佐世保くんち}} - A festival centered around the shrine's grand festival held every year from November 1 to 3. *{{ill|List of shrines|ja|神社一覧}} *{{ill|Hachiman shrine|ja|八幡神}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kameyama Hachimangu}} [[Category:Shrines in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:beppyo shrines without templates]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[en:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Hachimangu]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Sasebo City]] [[Category:History of Sasebo City]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted Completion categories]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:bump]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:kk]] [[Category:qq]] [[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:亀山八幡宮_(佐世保市)]] {{Beppyo Shrines}} [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[sn:ameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:tier 5]][[Category: 5]][[Category:qq 1]]\[[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:tier 5]][[Category: 5]][[Category:qq 2]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:ameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]]

A festival centered around the shrine's grand festival held every year from November 1 to 3. *{{ill|List of shrines|ja|神社一覧}} *{{ill|Hachiman shrine|ja|八幡神}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kameyama Hachimangu}} [[Category:Shrines in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:beppyo shrines without templates]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[en:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Hachimangu]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Sasebo City]] [[Category:History of Sasebo City]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted Completion categories]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:bump]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:kk]] [[Category:qq]] [[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:亀山八幡宮_(佐世保市)]] {{Beppyo Shrines}} [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:ameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:tier 5]][[Category: 5]][[Category:qq 1]]\[[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:tier 5]][[Category: 5]][[Category:qq 2]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:ameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]]

{{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name=Kameyama Hachimangu | image=[[image:Kameyama hachimangu Sasebo.jpg|250px]]
Shrine building | location=Nagasaki Prefecture, Sasebo City, Hachiman Town 3-3 | coordinates={{Coord|33|10|54.78|N|129|43|1.98|E|region:JP-42_scale:5000|display=inline,title}} | deity={{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}
{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|仲哀天皇}}
{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|神功皇后}}
{{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}}
{{ill|Ukemochi|ja|保食神}} | Shrine_rank=Prefectural shrine・{{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社}} | annual_festival={{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} | map = {{location map|Japan Nagasaki Prefecture|label=Kameyama Hachimangu|float=center|relief=1|width=256}} }} '''Kameyama Hachimangu''' (かめやまはちまんぐう) is a [[Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県}}, {{ill|Sasebo City|ja|佐世保市}}. Known locally as "Hachiman Shrine" or "Hachiman-sama," it is the largest shrine in the city. == Overview == The shrine is located in the center of Sasebo City, northeast of the {{ill|Sasebo City Hall|ja|佐世保市役所}} and across from National Route 204. It is the only {{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社}} in the city. Within the grounds, there are a total of seven auxiliary shrines, including the Kameyama Inari Shrine. == History == According to the shrine's tradition, it began in the 4th year of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇}} ({{ill|Hakuhō period|ja|白鳳}}) when a {{ill|divine message|ja|神託}} led to the transfer of spirits from [[Usa Jingū]] From the {{ill|Meiji period|ja|明治時代}} onwards, it became a guardian shrine for the naval personnel of the {{ill|Sasebo Naval District|ja|軍港佐世保}}, but the shrine buildings were destroyed during the {{ill|Sasebo Air Raid|ja|佐世保空襲}} on June 29, 1945. The current buildings were rebuilt in 1964 using reinforced concrete. Before World War II, it was finally ranked as a {{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社}}, and after the war, it became a Beppyo shrine of the {{ill|Association of Shinto Shrines|ja|神社本庁}}. == Deities == *{{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}} *{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|仲哀天皇}} *{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|神功皇后}} *{{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}} *{{ill|Ukemochi|ja|保食神}} == Events == [[File:Kameyama hachimangu shrine Summer festival.JPG|thumbnail|right|Kameyama Hachimangu Summer festival]] *Hatsumode, Coming-of-Age ceremony, Omiyamairi, {{ill|Shichi-Go-San|ja|七五三参り}}, {{ill|Sasebo Kunchi|ja|佐世保くんち}} *Summer festival - Held from August 1 to 3. Stalls and vendors are set up along the approach, and dances are performed on the stage within the shrine grounds. Until around 2010, fireworks were launched from the grounds of the adjacent {{ill|Sasebo Kita Junior High and High School|ja|長崎県立佐世保北中学校・高等学校}} at 9 PM on the first and last days, and Niagara fireworks were lit within the shrine grounds. == Access == *{{ill|Saihi Motor|ja|西肥自動車}} (including {{ill|Sasebo Bus|ja|させぼバス}}) Get off at "Sasebo City Hall" *{{ill|Matsuura Railway|ja|松浦鉄道}} {{ill|Nishi-Kyushu Line|ja|西九州線}} Get off at "Kita-Sasebo Station", 8 minutes on foot == See also == *{{ill|Sasebo Kunchi|ja|佐世保くんち}} - A festival centered around the shrine's grand festival held every year from November 1 to 3. *{{ill|List of shrines|ja|神社一覧}} *{{ill|Hachiman shrine|ja|八幡神}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kameyama Hachimangu}} [[Category:Shrines in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:beppyo shrines without templates]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[en:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Hachimangu]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Sasebo City]] [[Category:History of Sasebo City]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:completion tier 3]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:bump]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:kk]] [[Category:qq]] [[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:亀山八幡宮_(佐世保市)]] {{Beppyo Shrines}} [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:ameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:tier 5]][[Category: 5]][[Category:qq 1]]\[[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:tier 5]][[Category: 5]][[Category:qq 2]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:ameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:qq]]

Known locally as "Hachiman Shrine" or "Hachiman-sama," it is the largest shrine in the city. == Overview == The shrine is located in the center of Sasebo City, northeast of the {{ill|Sasebo City Hall|ja|佐世保市役所}} and across from National Route 204. Within the grounds, there are a total of seven auxiliary shrines, including the Kameyama Inari Shrine. == History == According to the shrine's tradition, it began in the 4th year of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇}} ({{ill|Hakuhō period|ja|白鳳}}) when a {{ill|divine message|ja|神託}} led to the transfer of spirits from [[Usa Jingū]] From the {{ill|Meiji period|ja|明治時代}} onwards, it became a guardian shrine for the naval personnel of the {{ill|Sasebo Naval District|ja|軍港佐世保}}, but the shrine buildings were destroyed during the {{ill|Sasebo Air Raid|ja|佐世保空襲}} on June 29, 1945. Known locally as "Hachiman Shrine" or "Hachiman-sama," it is the largest shrine in the city. == Overview == The shrine is located in the center of Sasebo City, northeast of the {{ill|Sasebo City Hall|ja|佐世保市役所}} and across from National Route 204. It is the only {{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社}} in the city. Within the grounds, there are a total of seven auxiliary shrines, including the Kameyama Inari Shrine. == History == According to the shrine's tradition, it began in the 4th year of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇}} ({{ill|Hakuhō period|ja|白鳳}}) when a {{ill|divine message|ja|神託}} led to the transfer of spirits from [[Usa Jingū]] From the {{ill|Meiji period|ja|明治時代}} onwards, it became a guardian shrine for the naval personnel of the {{ill|Sasebo Naval District|ja|軍港佐世保}}, but the shrine buildings were destroyed during the {{ill|Sasebo Air Raid|ja|佐世保空襲}} on June 29, 1945. The current buildings were rebuilt in 1964 using reinforced concrete. A festival centered around the shrine's grand festival held every year from November 1 to 3. *{{ill|List of shrines|ja|神社一覧}} *{{ill|Hachiman shrine|ja|八幡神}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kameyama Hachimangu}} [[Category:Shrines in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:beppyo shrines without templates]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[en:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Hachimangu]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Sasebo City]] [[Category:History of Sasebo City]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:completion tier 3]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[ja:亀山八幡宮_(佐世保市)]] {{Beppyo Shrines}} [[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:ameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:tier 5]][[Category: 5]]\[[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:tier 5]][[Category: 5]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]] [[Category:11]][[sn:ameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]]

{{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name=Kameyama Hachimangu | image=[[image:Kameyama hachimangu Sasebo.jpg|250px]]
Shrine building | location=Nagasaki Prefecture, Sasebo City, Hachiman Town 3-3 | coordinates={{Coord|33|10|54.78|N|129|43|1.98|E|region:JP-42_scale:5000|display=inline,title}} | deity={{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}
{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|仲哀天皇}}
{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|神功皇后}}
{{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}}
{{ill|Ukemochi|ja|保食神}} | Shrine_rank=Prefectural shrine・{{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社}} | annual_festival={{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} | map = {{location map|Japan Nagasaki Prefecture|label=Kameyama Hachimangu|float=center|relief=1|width=256}} }} '''Kameyama Hachimangu''' (かめやまはちまんぐう) is a [[Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県}}, {{ill|Sasebo City|ja|佐世保市}}. Known locally as "Hachiman Shrine" or "Hachiman-sama," it is the largest shrine in the city. == Overview == The shrine is located in the center of Sasebo City, northeast of the {{ill|Sasebo City Hall|ja|佐世保市役所}} and across from National Route 204. It is the only {{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社}} in the city. Within the grounds, there are a total of seven auxiliary shrines, including the Kameyama Inari Shrine. == History == According to the shrine's tradition, it began in the 4th year of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu}} ({{ill|Hakuhō period|ja|白鳳}}) when a {{ill|divine message|ja|神託}} led to the transfer of spirits from [[Usa Jingū]] From the {{ill|Meiji period|ja|明治時代}} onwards, it became a guardian shrine for the naval personnel of the {{ill|Sasebo Naval District|ja|軍港佐世保}}, but the shrine buildings were destroyed during the {{ill|Sasebo Air Raid|ja|佐世保空襲}} on June 29, 1945. The current buildings were rebuilt in 1964 using reinforced concrete. Before World War II, it was finally ranked as a {{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社}}, and after the war, it became a Beppyo shrine of the {{ill|Association of Shinto Shrines|ja|神社本庁}}. == Deities == *{{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}} *{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|仲哀天皇}} *{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|神功皇后}} *{{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}} *{{ill|Ukemochi|ja|保食神}} == Events == [[File:Kameyama hachimangu shrine Summer festival.JPG|thumbnail|right|Kameyama Hachimangu Summer festival]] *Hatsumode, Coming-of-Age ceremony, Omiyamairi, {{ill|Shichi-Go-San|ja|七五三参り}}, {{ill|Sasebo Kunchi|ja|佐世保くんち}} *Summer festival - Held from August 1 to 3. Stalls and vendors are set up along the approach, and dances are performed on the stage within the shrine grounds. Until around 2010, fireworks were launched from the grounds of the adjacent {{ill|Sasebo Kita Junior High and High School|ja|長崎県立佐世保北中学校・高等学校}} at 9 PM on the first and last days, and Niagara fireworks were lit within the shrine grounds. == Access == *{{ill|Saihi Motor|ja|西肥自動車}} (including {{ill|Sasebo Bus|ja|させぼバス}}) Get off at "Sasebo City Hall" *{{ill|Matsuura Railway|ja|松浦鉄道}} {{ill|Nishi-Kyushu Line|ja|西九州線}} Get off at "Kita-Sasebo Station", 8 minutes on foot == See also == *{{ill|Sasebo Kunchi|ja|佐世保くんち}} - A festival centered around the shrine's grand festival held every year from November 1 to 3. *{{ill|List of shrines|ja|神社一覧}} *{{ill|Hachiman shrine|ja|八幡神}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kameyama Hachimangu}} [[Category:Shrines in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:beppyo shrines without templates]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[en:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Hachimangu]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Sasebo City]] [[Category:History of Sasebo City]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:completion tier 3]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[ja:亀山八幡宮_(佐世保市)]] {{Beppyo Shrines}} [[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:ameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:tier 5]][[Category: 5]]\[[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:tier 5]][[Category: 5]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]] [[Category:11]][[sn:ameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]]

Known locally as "Hachiman Shrine" or "Hachiman-sama," it is the largest shrine in the city. == Overview == The shrine is located in the center of Sasebo City, northeast of the {{ill|Sasebo City Hall|ja|佐世保市役所}} and across from National Route 204. It is the only {{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社}} in the city. Within the grounds, there are a total of seven auxiliary shrines, including the Kameyama Inari Shrine. == History == According to the shrine's tradition, it began in the 4th year of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} ({{ill|Hakuhō period|ja|白鳳}}) when a {{ill|divine message|ja|神託}} led to the transfer of spirits from [[Usa Jingū]] From the {{ill|Meiji period|ja|明治時代}} onwards, it became a guardian shrine for the naval personnel of the {{ill|Sasebo Naval District|ja|軍港佐世保}}, but the shrine buildings were destroyed during the {{ill|Sasebo Air Raid|ja|佐世保空襲}} on June 29, 1945. The current buildings were rebuilt in 1964 using reinforced concrete. Before World War II, it was finally ranked as a {{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社}}, and after the war, it became a Beppyo shrine of the {{ill|Association of Shinto Shrines|ja|神社本庁}}. == Deities == *{{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}} *{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|仲哀天皇}} *{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|神功皇后}} *{{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}} *{{ill|Ukemochi|ja|保食神}} == Events == [[File:Kameyama hachimangu shrine Summer festival.JPG|thumbnail|right|Kameyama Hachimangu Summer festival]] *Hatsumode, Coming-of-Age ceremony, Omiyamairi, {{ill|Shichi-Go-San|ja|七五三参り}}, {{ill|Sasebo Kunchi|ja|佐世保くんち}} *Summer festival - Held from August 1 to 3. Stalls and vendors are set up along the approach, and dances are performed on the stage within the shrine grounds. Until around 2010, fireworks were launched from the grounds of the adjacent {{ill|Sasebo Kita Junior High and High School|ja|長崎県立佐世保北中学校・高等学校}} at 9 PM on the first and last days, and Niagara A festival centered around the shrine's grand festival held every year from November 1 to 3. *{{ill|List of shrines|ja|神社一覧}} *{{ill|Hachiman shrine|ja|八幡神}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kameyama Hachimangu}} [[Category:Shrines in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:beppyo shrines without templates]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[en:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Hachimangu]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Sasebo City]] [[Category:History of Sasebo City]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:completion tier 6]][[Category: tier 3]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[ja:亀山八幡宮_(佐世保市)]] {{Beppyo Shrines}} [[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:ameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]][[Category: tier 6]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category: 5]]\[[Category:Completion tier 6]][[Category: tier 6]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category: 5]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]] [[Category:11]][[sn:ameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:New]]

{{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name=Kameyama Hachimangu | image=[[image:Kameyama hachimangu Sasebo.jpg|250px]]
Shrine building | location=Nagasaki Prefecture, Sasebo City, Hachiman Town 3-3 | coordinates={{Coord|33|10|54.78|N|129|43|1.98|E|region:JP-42_scale:5000|display=inline,title}} | deity={{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}
{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|仲哀天皇}}
{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|神功皇后}}
{{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}}
{{ill|Ukemochi|ja|保食神}} | Shrine_rank=Prefectural shrine・{{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社}} | annual_festival={{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} | map = {{location map|Japan Nagasaki Prefecture|label=Kameyama Hachimangu|float=center|relief=1|width=256}} }} '''Kameyama Hachimangu''' (かめやまはちまんぐう) is a [[Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県}}, {{ill|Sasebo City|ja|佐世保市}}. Known locally as "Hachiman Shrine" or "Hachiman-sama," it is the largest shrine in the city. == Overview == The shrine is located in the center of Sasebo City, northeast of the {{ill|Sasebo City Hall|ja|佐世保市役所}} and across from National Route 204. It is the only {{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社}} in the city. Within the grounds, there are a total of seven auxiliary shrines, including the Kameyama Inari Shrine. == History == According to the shrine's tradition, it began in the 4th year of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} ({{ill|Hakuhō period|ja|白鳳}}) when a {{ill|divine message|ja|神託}} led to the transfer of spirits from [[Usa Jingū]] From the {{ill|Meiji period|ja|明治時代}} onwards, it became a guardian shrine for the naval personnel of the {{ill|Sasebo Naval District|ja|軍港佐世保}}, but the shrine buildings were destroyed during the {{ill|Sasebo Air Raid|ja|佐世保空襲}} on June 29, 1945. The current buildings were rebuilt in 1964 using reinforced concrete. Before World War II, it was finally ranked as a {{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社}}, and after the war, it became a Beppyo shrine of the {{ill|Association of Shinto Shrines|ja|神社本庁}}. == Deities == *{{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}} *{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|仲哀天皇}} *{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|神功皇后}} *{{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}} *{{ill|Ukemochi|ja|保食神}} == Events == [[File:Kameyama hachimangu shrine Summer festival.JPG|thumbnail|right|Kameyama Hachimangu Summer festival]] *Hatsumode, Coming-of-Age ceremony, Omiyamairi, {{ill|Shichi-Go-San|ja|七五三参り}}, {{ill|Sasebo Kunchi|ja|佐世保くんち}} *Summer festival - Held from August 1 to 3. Stalls and vendors are set up along the approach, and dances are performed on the stage within the shrine grounds. Until around 2010, fireworks were launched from the grounds of the adjacent {{ill|Sasebo Kita Junior High and High School|ja|長崎県立佐世保北中学校・高等学校}} at 9 PM on the first and last days, and Niagara fireworks were lit within the shrine grounds. == Access == *{{ill|Saihi Motor|ja|西肥自動車}} (including {{ill|Sasebo Bus|ja|させぼバス}}) Get off at "Sasebo City Hall" *{{ill|Matsuura Railway|ja|松浦鉄道}} {{ill|Nishi-Kyushu Line|ja|西九州線}} Get off at "Kita-Sasebo Station", 8 minutes on foot == See also == *{{ill|Sasebo Kunchi|ja|佐世保くんち}} - A festival centered around the shrine's grand festival held every year from November 1 to 3. *{{ill|List of shrines|ja|神社一覧}} *{{ill|Hachiman shrine|ja|八幡神}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kameyama Hachimangu}} [[Category:Shrines in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:beppyo shrines without templates]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[en:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Hachimangu]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Sasebo City]] [[Category:History of Sasebo City]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:completion tier 6]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[ja:亀山八幡宮_(佐世保市)]] {{Beppyo Shrines}} [[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:ameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]][[Category: tier 6]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category: 5]]\[[Category:Completion tier 6]][[Category: tier 6]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category: 5]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]] [[Category:11]][[sn:ameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[sn:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:New]]

{{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name=Kameyama Hachimangu | image=[[image:Kameyama hachimangu Sasebo.jpg|250px]]
Shrine building | location=Nagasaki Prefecture, Sasebo City, Hachiman Town 3-3 | coordinates={{Coord|33|10|54.78|N|129|43|1.98|E|region:JP-42_scale:5000|display=inline,title}} | deity={{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}
{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|仲哀天皇}}
{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|神功皇后}}
{{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}}
{{ill|Ukemochi|ja|保食神}} | Shrine_rank=Prefectural shrine・{{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社}} | annual_festival={{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} | map = {{location map|Japan Nagasaki Prefecture|label=Kameyama Hachimangu|float=center|relief=1|width=256}} }} '''Kameyama Hachimangu''' (かめやまはちまんぐう) is a [[Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県}}, {{ill|Sasebo City|ja|佐世保市}}. Known locally as "Hachiman Shrine" or "Hachiman-sama," it is the largest shrine in the city. == Overview == The shrine is located in the center of Sasebo City, northeast of the {{ill|Sasebo City Hall|ja|佐世保市役所}} and across from National Route 204. It is the only {{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社}} in the city. Within the grounds, there are a total of seven auxiliary shrines, including the Kameyama Inari Shrine. == History == According to the shrine's tradition, it began in the 4th year of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} ({{ill|Hakuhō period|ja|白鳳}}) when a {{ill|divine message|ja|神託}} led to the transfer of spirits from [[Usa Jingū]] From the {{ill|Meiji period|ja|明治時代}} onwards, it became a guardian shrine for the naval personnel of the {{ill|Sasebo Naval District|ja|軍港佐世保}}, but the shrine buildings were destroyed during the {{ill|Sasebo Air Raid|ja|佐世保空襲}} on June 29, 1945. The current buildings were rebuilt in 1964 using reinforced concrete. Before World War II, it was finally ranked as a {{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社}}, and after the war, it became a Beppyo shrine of the {{ill|Association of Shinto Shrines|ja|神社本庁}}. == Deities == *{{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}} *{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|仲哀天皇}} *{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|神功皇后}} *{{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}} *{{ill|Ukemochi|ja|保食神}} == Events == [[File:Kameyama hachimangu shrine Summer festival.JPG|thumbnail|right|Kameyama Hachimangu Summer festival]] *Hatsumode, Coming-of-Age ceremony, Omiyamairi, {{ill|Shichi-Go-San|ja|七五三参り}}, {{ill|Sasebo Kunchi|ja|佐世保くんち}} *Summer festival - Held from August 1 to 3. Stalls and vendors are set up along the approach, and dances are performed on the stage within the shrine grounds. Until around 2010, fireworks were launched from the grounds of the adjacent {{ill|Sasebo Kita Junior High and High School|ja|長崎県立佐世保北中学校・高等学校}} at 9 PM on the first and last days, and Niagara fireworks were lit within the shrine grounds. == Access == *{{ill|Saihi Motor|ja|西肥自動車}} (including {{ill|Sasebo Bus|ja|させぼバス}}) Get off at "Sasebo City Hall" *{{ill|Matsuura Railway|ja|松浦鉄道}} {{ill|Nishi-Kyushu Line|ja|西九州線}} Get off at "Kita-Sasebo Station", 8 minutes on foot == See also == *{{ill|Sasebo Kunchi|ja|佐世保くんち}} - A festival centered around the shrine's grand festival held every year from November 1 to 3. *{{ill|List of shrines|ja|神社一覧}} *{{ill|Hachiman shrine|ja|八幡神}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kameyama Hachimangu}} [[Category:Shrines in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:beppyo shrines without templates]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[en:Kameyama Hachimangu Shrine]][[Category:Hachimangu]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Sasebo revision.text:
{{神社 | 名称=亀山八幡宮 | 画像=[[Image:Kameyama hachimangu Sasebo.jpg|250px]]
拝殿 | 所在地=[[長崎県]][[佐世保市]]八幡町3-3 | 位置={{Coord|33|10|54.78|N|129|43|1.98|E|region:JP-42_scale:5000|display=inline,title}} | 祭神=[[応神天皇]]
[[仲哀天皇]]
[[神功皇后]]
[[仁徳天皇]]
[[保食神]] | 社格=旧[[県社]]・[[別表神社]] | 例祭=[[10月15日]] | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nagasaki|label=亀山八幡宮|float=center|position=left|relief=1|width=200|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} '''亀山八幡宮'''（かめやまはちまんぐう）は、[[長崎県]][[佐世保市]]にある[[神社]]である。「八幡神社」や「八幡様」の通称で知られる、市内でも最大規模の境内を持つ神社。 == 概要 == 佐世保市の中心部、[[佐世保市役所]]と[[国道204号]]を挟んだ北東側に鎮座。市内で唯一の[[別表神社]]。 境内には亀山稲荷神社他合わせて7社の境内社がある。 == 歴史 == 神社に伝わる由緒によれば、[[天武天皇]][[白鳳]]4年に[[神託]]により[[宇佐神宮]]から[[分霊]]を迎えたのが始まりという。 [[明治時代]]以降に[[佐世保港|軍港佐世保]]の鎮守神として[[大日本帝国海軍|海軍]]将兵の信仰を集めたが、[[1945年]]6月29日未明の[[佐世保大空襲|佐世保空襲]]で社殿を焼失した。現在の社殿は戦後の[[1964年]]に再建されたもので鉄筋コンクリート製。 第2次世界大戦前は最終的に[[県社]]に列格し、戦後は[[神社本庁]]の別表神社となった。 == 祭神 == *[[応神天皇]] *[[仲哀天皇]] *[[神功皇后]] *[[仁徳天皇]] *[[保食神]] == 行事 == [[ファイル:Kameyama hachimangu shrine Summer festival.JPG|サムネイル|右|亀山八幡宮 夏祭りの様子]] *初詣、成人式、お宮参り、[[七五三参り]]、[[佐世保くんち]] *夏祭り - 8月1日～3日の3日間。参道に屋台・的屋などの[[出店]]があり、境内の舞台では舞踊が披露される。また、2010年頃まで初日と最終日の午後9時より、隣接する[[長崎県立佐世保北中学校・高等学校|佐世保北高等学校]]のグラウンドより[[花火]]が打ち上げられ、境内ではナイアガラ花火の点火を行なっていた。 == 交通 == *[[西肥自動車|西肥バス]]（[[させぼバス]]も含む）「佐世保市役所前」下車 *[[松浦鉄道]][[松浦鉄道西九州線|西九州線]][[北佐世保駅]]下車 徒歩8分 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == *[[佐世保くんち]] - 当神社の大祭である神幸祭を中心とした祭礼。毎年[[11月1日]]～[[11月3日]]。 *[[神社一覧]] *[[八幡神]] == 外部リンク == * {{Facebook|kameyamahatimangu}} * {{Instagram|kameyamahachimangu.official}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かめやまはちまんくう}} [[Category:長崎県の神社]] [[Category:別表神社]] [[Category:長崎県の旧県社]] [[Category:八幡宮]] [[Category:佐世保市の建築物]] [[Category:佐世保市の歴史]]

{{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name=Kameyama Hachimangu | image=
Shrine building | location=Nagasaki Prefecture, Sasebo City, Hachiman Town 3-3 | coordinates={{Coord|33|10|54.78|N|129|43|1.98|E|region:JP-42_scale:5000|display=inline,title}} | deity=[[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]]
